findingDetails.claim: prompt-models packet frontmatter denies the read tools its own router contract requires.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Checked parent hub routing and README guidance for a possible parent-level tool grant or non-reading workflow; parent can load packets, but per-packet behavior is not flattened and the packet explicitly requires local profile/index reads.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: allowed-tools: [] may have been intended as no mutating tools, but that conflicts with the registry's explicit read-only surface and the router pseudocode.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to P2 if runtime proof shows packet allowed-tools is ignored for skill resource loading and only the parent hub grant applies.
